name: Church of St. Pastery
description: The Pluritine Church's representation in Lankshorn. Built from antique stone with a tall steeple and carved gargoyles and angels in conflict. The exterior is dramatic and imposing; the interior is plain and unadorned.
notes: A wooden statue of St. Pastery stands inside, depicted holding a shovel and cleaver.
Father Dobey serves as priest. He carries a gold holy symbol.
